title: COMMUNITY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: LIFEWAYS INC COMMUNITY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a continuum of care for people with mental health challenges, designed to help consumers move toward maximum recovery and successful community life. Services include individual and group therapy, skill development, targeted case management, hospital discharge services, dual diagnosis treatment, peer-delivered services, representative payee services, residential and 20-hour personal care services, and coordinated care services. Most services are provided at client's residence. 702 Sunset Drive Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Diagnosis of severe mental illness and deficits in at least two life domains Hours: Monday-Wednesday 8am-6pm, Thursday and Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 889-9167 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-9167 Toll-free (800) 995-9169 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by a state or regional mental health program or via assessment process. Call for information and to discuss needs with a counselor. FEES: Varies by service. Sliding scale fees available. Assistance to review income and insurance coverage is available. DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Services: Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Psychiatric Case Management Transitional Mental Health Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - PEER SUPPORT CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREASURE VALLEY REGION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWAYS INC
